series_metadata.series_title: Credit Union Guaranty Corporation Board/Committee Minutes and Reports
series_metadata.series_description: These records contain the minutes and reports of the Credit Union Guaranty Corporation Board of Directors and committees.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain paper copy in operating area until imaged and indexed. Upon confirmation that paper copy has been checked for quality and completeness, destroy. ; Electronic: Retain electronic files for two (2) years from date of receipt, and then destroy., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
